698042.title: Fred Hutchinson Cancer Center

pageprops.wikibase-shortdesc: Cancer research institute in Seattle, US

698042.description: Cancer research institute in Seattle, US
698042.extract: The Fred Hutchinson Cancer Center, formerly known as the Fred Hutchinson Cancer Research Center and also known as Fred Hutch or The Hutch, is a cancer research institute established in 1975 in Seattle, Washington.
